## Summary
Adds the docs-only RCA and semantic-integrity plan/contract for the Great Expectations Story Ledger repair stack.

## Scope
- Docs only
- No runtime/code behavior changes

## Added
- `docs/rca/great-expectations-story-ledger-rca.md`
- `docs/architecture/story-ledger-semantic-integrity-plan.md`
- `docs/canon/STORY_LEDGER_SEMANTIC_INTEGRITY_CONTRACT.md`

## Purpose
Lock the diagnosis and ordered PR stack before broader implementation, preserving one-failure-class-per-PR discipline.
